user_query:
I need a production-grade agent-harness configuration and delivery package for our AI coding workspace. Please read these inputs under input/ and produce the specified outputs:

Inputs to read:
- input/project_manifest.json — languages, repository hints, and rules preferences
- input/threat_policies.yaml — our runtime security policy and logging prefs
- input/entra/role_assignments.json — an exported subset of our identity/role data
- input/branding.json — tone/brand cues for the presentation

Deliverables to create under output/:
1) output/harness/config.json — A single, well-structured JSON config describing our agent harness. Include:
   - slash_commands: at least a planning command and a research-first command (name them sensibly and include short descriptions)
   - hooks: lifecycle hooks with selectable strictness profiles (minimal, standard, strict) and a memory persistence concept; specify how profile selection and selective hook disabling would work (keys and values only; this is a spec, not executable code)
   - runtime_security: reference a separate runtime_checks file (see #2), and set its enforcement mode based on input/threat_policies.yaml; also include a logging path under output/ (relative path only)
   - package_manager_detection: define a priority chain exactly in this order — ["env_var", "project_config", "package_json_field", "lock_file", "global_config", "fallback"]. Document the expected keys/filenames each step would look for in a generic, tool-agnostic way
   - language_rules: include rule sets for all languages found in input/project_manifest.json (e.g., strict mode or validation rules for each language), with rule names and rationale

2) output/security/runtime_checks.json — A machine-readable spec enumerating exactly 12 runtime checks with fields id, severity, and description. Use these ids verbatim so other systems can consume them: [RT_REVSHELL, RT_CRED_EXFIL, RT_GUARDRAIL_OFF, RT_GATEKEEPER, RT_AMOS, RT_MAL_IP, RT_DNS_EXFIL, RT_B64_SHELL, RT_CURL_BASH, RT_SSH_READ, RT_WALLET, RT_CLOUD_META]. Severity should be CRITICAL or HIGH as appropriate. Descriptions should be clear and concise. Do not include code; this is a policy spec.

3) output/identity/entra_audit.json — An identity risk assessment based solely on input/entra/role_assignments.json. Include:
   - risk_score: one of ["Critical", "High", "Medium", "Low"]
   - findings: an array of objects with fields principal, finding, risk, and mitre (technique id or label)
   - At least one finding must call out permanently privileged administrators lacking MFA, if present in the input, and map to a relevant MITRE ATT&CK technique
   - At least 3 findings total, even if some are best-practice gaps; keep all content grounded in the provided input (no external lookups)

4) output/presentation/overview.html — A zero-dependency HTML presentation (single file, inline CSS/JS) that summarizes the harness configuration and security posture for stakeholders. Requirements:
   - At least 4 slides using <section class="slide"> … </section>, each slide exactly one viewport tall with overflow hidden and a clear title per slide
   - Slides to include: Title; Harness Overview (slash commands, lifecycle hooks, rules); Runtime Security (mention "Runtime Security Checks" and show "12"); Identity Audit Summary (mention the risk score and number of findings)
   - Include CSS that enforces height: 100vh (or 100dvh) for .slide and prevents scrolling within slides; keep everything self-contained and text-only

General notes:
- Keep all paths relative to this workspace; do not reference absolute or user home paths
- Do not include any external dependencies, binaries, or install commands — this is a configuration and documentation package only
- Ensure the runtime security mode you set in config.json adheres to input/threat_policies.yaml
- Ensure the package manager detection priority matches the exact order specified above
- Make the presentation professional in tone and readable on desktop and mobile (text-only)

When you’re done, confirm the four files were written to the exact paths above.
